title: Lagos Business Summit Focuses on Thriving Beyond Economic Instability - FinancialEDGE

html:
The 6th edition of Beady’s Word Production Business Summit took place in Lagos, focusing on “Thriving Beyond Economic Instability, Driving SME Growth with Digital Transformation, Innovation & Local Resources.”

The event featured prominent speakers, including Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director of Financial Edge, and Seye  Olurotimi founder of MSME Africa.

The summit emphasized the importance of digital transformation for SME growth amidst economic instability.

Experts shared insights on leveraging innovation and local resources to drive business success.

Seye Olurotimi, contributed to the discussions, highlighting strategies for thriving in challenging economic times.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Seye Olurotimi Founder MSME Africa and Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge at the 6th edition of Beadys Word Production Business Summit in Lagos.
